titles.en: Chapter on a Man Who Makes a Bequest of Wealth in the Way of Allah
Chapter on a Man Who Makes a Bequest of Wealth in the Way of Allah

segments: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْعَسْكَرِيَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَوْصَى بِمَالٍ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ فَقَالَ "سَبِيلُ اَللَّهِ شِيعَتُنَا ".
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْعَسْكَرِيَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَوْصَى بِمَالٍ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ فَقَالَ "سَبِيلُ اَللَّهِ شِيعَتُنَا ".

segments:
Hadith.5478 - Muhammad bin Isa bin Ubaid narrated from Al-Hasan bin Rashid, who said:
I asked Abu Al-Hasan Al-Askari, (Imam Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Hadi (as)) about a man who made a will to dedicate wealth "in the way of Allah (swt)" (fi sabeelillah).
Imam (as) replied: "The way of Allah (swt) is our Shia (followers)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5478 - Muhammad bin Isa bin Ubaid narrated from Al-Hasan bin Rashid, who said:
I asked Abu Al-Hasan Al-Askari, (Imam Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Hadi (as)) about a man who made a will to dedicate wealth "in the way of Allah (swt)" (fi sabeelillah).
Imam (as) replied: "The way of Allah (swt) is our Shia (followers)."

narratorChain.raw: 5478 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى بْنِ عُبَيْدٍ عَنِ اَلْحَسَنِ بْنِ رَاشِدٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on a Man Who Makes a Bequest of Wealth in the Way of Allah

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنَّ رَجُلاً أَوْصَى إِلَيَّ بِشَيْءٍ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ فَقَالَ لِي "اِصْرِفْهُ فِي اَلْحَجِّ" قَالَ قُلْتُ أَوْصَى إِلَيَّ فِي اَلسَّبِيلِ قَالَ "اِصْرِفْهُ فِي اَلْحَجِّ فَإِنِّي لاَ أَعْلَمُ سَبِيلاً مِنْ سُبُلِهِ أَفْضَلَ مِنَ اَلْحَجِّ".
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنَّ رَجُلاً أَوْصَى إِلَيَّ بِشَيْءٍ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ فَقَالَ لِي "اِصْرِفْهُ فِي اَلْحَجِّ" قَالَ قُلْتُ أَوْصَى إِلَيَّ فِي اَلسَّبِيلِ قَالَ "اِصْرِفْهُ فِي اَلْحَجِّ فَإِنِّي لاَ أَعْلَمُ سَبِيلاً مِنْ سُبُلِهِ أَفْضَلَ مِنَ اَلْحَجِّ".

segments:
Hadith.5479 - Muhammad bin Isa narrated from Muhammad bin Sulayman from Al-Husayn bin Umar, who said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as), "A man made a will to me regarding something in the way of Allah (swt)."
Imam (as) said to me: "Use it for Hajj."
I said: "He made a will to me in the way."
Imam (as) said: "Use it for Hajj, for I do not know of any path among His (swt) paths better than Hajj."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5479 - Muhammad bin Isa narrated from Muhammad bin Sulayman from Al-Husayn bin Umar, who said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as), "A man made a will to me regarding something in the way of Allah (swt)."
Imam (as) said to me: "Use it for Hajj."
I said: "He made a will to me in the way."
Imam (as) said: "Use it for Hajj, for I do not know of any path among His (swt) paths better than Hajj."

narratorChain.raw: 5479 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ
